title: Neurotoxic alkaloid in pollen and nectar excludes generalist bees from foraging at death-camas, Toxicoscordion paniculatum (Melanthiaceae)
coding_note: Crossref abstract identifies zygacine in pollen and nectar, biologically relevant syrup-dose assays on Osmia lignaria, adverse foraging response, and a five-state flower-visitor survey.
